loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing current THD compliance and voltage THD compliance — per-phase harmonic distortion (H5/H7) and flicker/crest factor are not measured by this meter.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing I-THD and V-THD phase trends — 5th/7th harmonics are not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Load Impact & Transformer Stress
loop1.note: Showing PF Health (Displacement PF, True PF, and their gap) — K-Stress and PF Angle tabs are omitted as K-factor and phase angle are not directly measured by this asset's meter.
